latest.title: Locked Out of the World Cup: A Year Marked by Barriers, Borders, and Broken Access
latest.summary: The 2026 World Cup promises a global celebration. Many Arab fans may find themselves locked out.

latest.title: Moscow hit by largest Ukrainian attack since start of Russia's full-scale war
latest.summary: A refinery and a shopping centre were burning after almost 200 Ukrainian drones struck an area to the south-east of the Russian capital.

latest.title: Obama Center launch brings Democratic political glitterati to Chicago ahead of crucial…
latest.summary: Political elites, White House alums, donors and business leaders will converge on Chicago on Thursday to commemorate the launch of the Obama…

latest.title: Young women now have 'close to zero' risk of cervical cancer death after HPV jab
latest.summary: A new study finds that hundreds of lives have been saved since school-age girls were offered the HPV jab in 2008.

radar.title: Lawyer of Uganda opposition figure Besigye charged with treason-related offence
radar.summary: Uganda's military chief had boasted of "the hurt and pain" he would inflict on Erias Lukwago, who was arrested earlier this week.

radar.title: Iran Gets Major Economic Lifeline for Minimal Concessions in Initial Deal
radar.summary: The agreement delays the most difficult steps for Iran for later talks, while granting it a crucial economic lifeline.

radar.title: Suspected gang leader shot dead in flower bouquet ambush at airport
radar.summary: The gunmen concealed their weapons behind flowers and stuffed toys while waiting for the victim outside Guayaquil airport.

radar.title: Gunfire and explosions heard at Niger capital's airport
radar.summary: Niger has been fighting a militant Islamist insurgency for a decade and in January suspected jihadists attacked the same airport.
